refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation, task scheduling, and resource allocation.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level; decomposing it into sub-FRs focused on key productivity drivers (equipment operation efficiency, task scheduling, resource allocation) allows targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations; verify that each sub-FR contributes to meeting or exceeding the productivity target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation efficiency to maximize output per hour.
FR2: Schedule tasks effectively to minimize idle time and maximize utilization.
FR3: Allocate resources dynamically to support continuous productivity.

candidate_dps: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms to improve operation efficiency.
DP2: Intelligent task scheduling system to optimize work sequences.
DP3: Dynamic resource management framework to allocate assets in real-time.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms to improve operation efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling modules.
Dependency on real-time telemetry data for control adjustments.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically decoupled from task scheduling and resource allocation but requires telemetry input; interfaces are well-defined.

assumptions_risks: Risk of performance degradation if vehicle control algorithms are not well integrated with teleoperation.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating task scheduling and resource allocation DPs in subsequent decomposition levels to manage coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for vehicle operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time vehicle status and sensor data for control algorithm input.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task commands and schedules from higher-level systems.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Bidirectional communication channel for control commands and status updates.

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module naturally contains vehicle control DP with minimal diffusion.
NGHE Solution is broader; contains multiple DPs but less focused containment.
Teleoperation interacts with vehicle control but is a separate module.
Safety Services unrelated to vehicle control DP.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP1 to Vehicle module ensures focused ownership and minimal diffusion, facilitating maintainability and clear interface boundaries.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with Teleoperation module if control algorithms require tele-operator intervention.
Risk of interface complexity if telemetry data is inconsistent or delayed.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface contracts with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules to mitigate diffusion risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Possible interface complexity between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Telemetry data dependency may introduce latency affecting control performance.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment of DP1 with low diffusion, supporting clear ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring vehicle operation efficiency metrics and telemetry data during test operations.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of DP1 to Vehicle module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define detailed interface specifications between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Plan for telemetry data validation and latency mitigation strategies.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility. No immediate need to zigzag or revise at this level.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation efficiency to maximize output per hour.
FR2: Schedule tasks effectively to minimize idle time and maximize utilization.
FR3: Allocate resources dynamically to support continuous productivity.

revise.why: Current FR, DP, and IM assignments are consistent and well-justified.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely.
Vehicle control algorithms can be effectively encapsulated within the Vehicle module.
evidence_needed: Performance data from vehicle control algorithms during representative operations.
Interface validation tests between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
